Name: Antigen
Description: The antigenic base strain ID of the outbreak infection.

Name: Daily_Import_Pressures
Description: The rate of per-day importation for each node that the intervention is distributed to.

Name: Durations
Description: The durations over which to apply import pressure.

Name: Genome
Description: The genetic substrain ID of the outbreak infection. Together with **Antigen**, they are a unitary object representing a strain of infection, which allows for differentiation among infections. Values for **Genome** may range from -1 to 2\ :sup:`Log2_Number_of_Genomes_per_Clade-1`

Name: Import_Age
Description: The age (in days) of infected import cases.
